political.s: Silk PAC (WhiteWave leadership) contributed $99,100 in 2019-2020 cycle, favoring Democratic candidates 100%. WhiteWave engaged in organic agriculture lobbying and faced scrutiny for NOSB (National Organic Standards Board) influence concerns.

charity.s: When under Dean Foods ownership, company supported childhood hunger initiatives and community nonprofits. Current Danone/Silk giving practices not publicly detailed at subsidiary level.

environment.s: WhiteWave achieved 32% GHG emissions reduction per pound (2006-2016 baseline), 78% waste diversion from landfills, and committed to 20% additional reductions by 2025. Sourced 100% sustainable cocoa by 2016 and committed to RSPO-compliant palm oil by 2020.

labor.s: Limited public OSHA/NLRB data available. WhiteWave reported 7,700+ volunteer hours in 2010 and employee sustainability engagement programs, but specific labor dispute records not readily disclosed.

dei.s: Not publicly available at subsidiary level. Danone North America became a Certified B Corporation in 2023 but specific DEI metrics for Silk brand not disclosed.

animals.s: Plant-based dairy alternative brand; animal testing not applicable to product category.

guns.s: Food and beverage company with no firearms-related business activity.

privacy.s: Privacy practices not publicly detailed as corporate accountability concern for food/beverage subsidiary.

execPay.s: Not disclosed. Company acquired by Danone in 2017; executive compensation data not publicly available at subsidiary level.

sec.note: Pay ratio extracted from proxy filing — verify manually for accuracy
